steps.description: Go to chatgpt.com and sign in to your account.
Click New project in the left sidebar.
Type your Minion's name followed by HEIST BASE - example: KEVIN's HEIST BASE. Then click Create project.

cards.title: Add Instructions
cards.description: Load your Minion's permanent instructions into the project.

steps.description: Click the ··· button in the top right corner of your project.
Select Project settings from the menu.
Paste the instructions below into the Instructions field.

cards.title: Upload Mission Data
cards.description: Click the Sources tab in your project. Download the mission data file below, then click Add sources to upload it.

cards.title: Meet & Test Your Minion
cards.description: Run each prompt in a separate new chat inside your Project. Do not use the same chat for both - that is the point. Each chat should start fresh, but your Minion will still remember everything.

prompts.label: Meet Your Minion
prompts.description: Start a new chat inside your Project and run this prompt. Your Minion will introduce themselves.

prompts.label: Test the Memory
prompts.description: Open a second new chat inside the same Project and run this prompt. A brand new chat - but your Minion still knows everything.

mission.title: Find the Answers
mission.description: Ask your Minion the 5 mission questions to plan the heist.

bonus.title: Bonus Tool
bonus.description: Ask your Minion to invent one unique tool based on what the data revealed.
